top_patterns.description: Expressing gratitude or reflection on the day, experience, or feelings.
example_quotes: Great words to end the week and think about the possibilities that the next one will bring
The perfect ending to an awesome day. #grateful

top_patterns.description: Describing a specific activity, event, or moment, often with enthusiasm.
example_quotes: Summit checking out the waves for dada. Great day to be in Southern California #homebreak

top_patterns.description: Posing a thought or inviting reflection, often open-ended.
example_quotes: Nothing like a day spent shoe giving in the USA and then having the child school me in a game of one on one basketball.
My @TOMS cheering on the Deacs with @wubetu_shimelash #godeacs
Thanks @dierksbentley for letting me co-pilot last night. An experience I will never forget!!!
Great words to end the week and think about the possibilities that the next one will bring
Summit checking out the waves for dada. Great day to be in Southern California #homebreak
I am charging into my 40th b day! Feeling connected to the land and my tribe carpe freaking diem!
Landing back here never fails to take my breath away.

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences (1-2 lines), some with multiple clauses
language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal; often single paragraph or separated by hashtags

example_quotes: Feeling connected to the land and my tribe
An experience I will never forget!!!
Thanks @dierksbentley for letting me co-pilot last night.
Great words to end the week
Summit checking out the waves for dada.

anti_patterns: Lack of personal voice or emotion

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice is personal, reflective, activity-focused, with gratitude and enthusiasm.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more concise, emotionally direct captions; less verbose storytelling.
